productDisplayName: Decathlon Men Quechua Grey Sports Shoes
description: The sleek silhouetting on this shoe from quechua will make this low-top pair an off-duty essential. These kicks are great for a casual jog on a foggy weekday or while training on the tracks. Wear these with a tracksuit or with your favourite jeans and a sweatshirt.UpperTextile upper with synthetic leather overlays Reinforced overlay on the toe box and heel collarCentral lace upsPadded tongue Padded insole for instep comfortMeshed and padded innerOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel and toe box for abrasion free comfortMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleCurved midfoot with waffle patterned lugs on the TPU outsoleHerringbone grooves on the lugsShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store under direct sunlight
